ops.title: ship --skip-hunk: optionally refuse when snapshot has hunks beyond the pre-flight set

ops.text: buildSelectionPlan records the pre-flight hunk digest set per file; apply-selection (jj) and gitStageSelected refuse (or warn) when the authoritative snapshot contains hunks not present at pre-flight, closing the skip-mode fail-open window for foreign hunks written mid-ship. Decide refuse-vs-flag semantics first — skip mode's contract is 'everything except named', so this is a semantic tightening, not a bug fix (2026-07-17 review: exposure strictly less than whole-file baseline).
